column2: CAA Officer Fails to Address Findings or Observations
column3: ['The CAA officer receives a notification of a finding or observation. ', 'The CAA officer does not take subsequent actions as expected, such as investigation and communication with the entity approval holder. ', 'The oversight report and associated findings/observations remain open. ']
column4: ['A notification of a finding or observation is received by the CAA officer. ', 'The CAA officer fails to address the findings or observations in an appropriate manner. ', 'The oversight report and its related findings/observations are not closed, indicating that no corrective actions have been taken by the CAA officer. ']
